reasoning: As of the knowledge cutoff (Nov 9, 2025), Apple has not announced the Apple Vision Pro 2. A search of Apple's newsroom shows the most recent relevant announcements were related to NBA games via Spectrum, not new hardware. The consensus among reputable analysts like Mark Gurman and Ming-Chi Kuo is a release timeline anywhere from late 2025 to spring/end of 2026, but the total absence of an announcement by early November makes a December release highly improbable. Apple typically announces major new hardware in September or October, and releasing a flagship device like the Vision Pro in December without prior fanfare runs contrary to their historical launch cadence. Given the tight window remaining before Dec 31, 2025, the probability approaches zero.
